required_preferences.fact: Includes her new French roommate in weekly meal planning — now prepares meals as a group rather than just with her Italian roommate

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly meal planning with her Italian roommate, ensuring balanced Mediterranean dishes — never meal preps alone

required_preferences.fact: Hosts Sunday evening dinners centered on familiar American comfort foods with her younger sister and invites other dorm residents — prioritizes sharing home-style dishes while her sister visits

supersedes.fact: Hosts Sunday evening pasta dinners with her Italian roommate and invites other dorm residents — never eats alone on weekends

required_preferences.fact: Uses café work shifts as practice for ordering and conversing in French — refuses to slip into English even with English-speaking customers
Coordinates daily texts and voice memos with her boyfriend to keep up despite the time zone difference — never relies just on social media updates
Eagerly participates in traditional rural activities with the French family, such as gardening, cooking regional dishes, and attending local celebrations during countryside stays
Prefers weekend digital detox at the countryside home, avoiding phone and social media use while with the family

persona: An exchange student living abroad for a semester
